---
title: "Jared Umphress"
image: media/headshot.JPG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jared-umphress-34a71a2b7/
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:jaredumphress@ucsb.edu
---

Hello there! I'm Jared Umphress. I am a third year Environmental Studies (B.S.) major at UC Santa Barbara. I am passionate about taking care of our environment in order to meet human and non-human needs. Thus, I am grateful to be learning and taking action on it in my academics. But I also like to get involved outside of school, whether that is attending local political meetings, or working at a farm. Click around the different tabs to learn more about me!
